fields.description: The bare DNS label the user chose, e.g. acme. A single label (no dots) so the site stays inside the one regional wildcard the proxy already terminates. The full site URL is <subdomain>.<region domain> — that FQDN is this row's name, the site-name-on-disk, and the proxy Host header (one routing string).
fields.label: Subdomain

fields.description: The Central team this site belongs to. Stamped by the Central-facing create_site API; set once at insert. Operator/e2e sites created directly may leave it empty.
fields.label: Tenant

fields.description: Controller-written lifecycle state. Running is reached ONLY on an observed HTTP 200 from the guest :80 (Frappe is actually serving), not when the backing VM boots. Pending → Provisioning → Deploying → Running; Failed on any error; Terminated after teardown.
fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Pending
Provisioning
Deploying
Running
Failed
Terminated

fields.description: The Virtual Machine that runs this site's Frappe bench, cloned from the golden bench snapshot by the controller (the user never picks it). Immutable once chosen.
fields.label: Virtual Machine

fields.description: The Subdomain (proxy map) row this site created once it began serving — deleting it takes the site off the front door. Written by the controller after the readiness gate.
fields.label: Routing Entry

fields.description: The attached Pilot (bench admin console) this site stood up on its OWN backing VM — fronted at <subdomain>-pilot.<region domain>, the front door Central's Asset resolves for 'Open'. Created by auto_provision after the site serves; terminated with the site. The customer's Frappe site is this Site itself (surfaced via get_site); the Pilot is the admin console on the same bench.
fields.label: Pilot

fields.description: When the controller entered the Provisioning phase (the clone + boot work began). Stamped by _set_status on the transition; the page derives the Preparing/Booting duration from the gap to the next phase. The Pending phase's start is the row's creation.
fields.label: Provisioning Started

fields.description: When the controller entered the Deploying phase (the VM booted; deploy-site began). The Installing/Waiting duration is the gap from here to the Running entry, or to now while still deploying.
fields.label: Deploying Started

fields.description: When the controller marked the site Running (HTTP 200 observed; the route was created). End of the timed work. The Putting-online/Live duration is the gap from the Deploying entry to here.
fields.label: Running Started

fields.description: The one-click Administrator session URL handed to the tenant instead of a password — minted by deploy-site.py (`bench browse --sid`, a real 24h session) and stamped before the readiness wait. The baked Administrator password is a long random secret generated at bake time and never surfaced. Surfaced to Central (event payload + get_site poll) once the site is Running. Controller-written.
fields.label: Login URL

fields.description: When login_url stops working (mint time + the `bench browse --sid` session's 24h TTL). Central compares against this to decide 'use it' vs 'regenerate'. Stamped alongside login_url before the readiness wait; empty until the site is Running.
fields.label: Login URL Expires At
